results.title: Two men stabbed in Manhattan, suspect arrested as NYPD probes possible hate crime
results.description: New York, July 24 (IANS) Two men were stabbed in separate attacks on Manhattan’s Upper West Side, with the New York Police Department (NYPD) arresting a 51-year-old suspect, Raul Morales, in connection with both incidents. Authorities said detectives are investigating the motive, including whether the attacks constitute a hate crime. New York City Police Commissioner ...

results.title: Oil set for weekly rise amid Red Sea shipping attacks, Kazakhstan output cuts
results.description: Oil prices are poised for weekly gains amid Red Sea shipping concerns. Houthi attacks on tankers have raised fears about a key shipping route. Kazakhstan has also temporarily reduced oil output after drone attacks. Its main Black Sea export terminal faced a temporary closure. These disruptions are tightening global energy supply routes.

results.title: DC Rajouri restricts movement andconstruction in flood-affected Bela Colony
results.description: DH NEWS SERVICERAJOURI, Jul 23District Magistrate Rajouri Abhishek Sharma has prohibited public and vehicular movement and suspended all construction activity in flood-affected Bela Market and Bela Colony following severe flooding caused by the Rajouri Tawi River during the intervening night of July 18–19, 2026.The order, issued under Section 163 of the Bharatiya Nagarik Suraksha Sanhita [...]

results.title: Significant Cyclospora Outbreak Linked to Shredded Lettuce Affects Thousands in the US
results.description: A significant Cyclospora outbreak in the US, linked to shredded iceberg lettuce, has affected over 6,000 individuals. Dr. Gerardo Lopez from the University of Arizona highlights the importance of food safety practices to mitigate risks. He provides seven practical tips, including washing all fresh produce, maintaining kitchen cleanliness, discarding bruised items, and avoiding harmful cleaning agents. The article emphasizes the need for caution with packaged produce and the benefits of cooking fruits and vegetables. Additionally, it stresses the importance of seeking medical attention for persistent symptoms associated with Cyclospora infection. Stay informed and protect your health with these essential guidelines.
